'''Kalis''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Derilyn system/Legends|Derilyn system]]. It was a harsh and remote world with a thick, boiling atmosphere. There was no life on the world.<ref name="PotG3" />

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], criminal [[Slicer/Legends|slicers]] constructed a secret harbor for slicing activities and the storage of stolen data on the planet.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Slicing|Security Through Obscurity}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
